mapper.insert: insert into classroom(id, teacher_id, name, description, join_code) values(#{id}, #{teacherId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{joinCode})
mapper.select: select classroom.*, teacher_id=#{id} as teacher from classroom where teacher_id =#{id} or id in (select classroom_id from classroom_member where student_id=#{id} ) order by teacher desc, name asc
